description: Enhance VPN Cores protocol configurations with comprehensive options for each protocol: OpenVPN (comp-lzo, push-route, fragment, mssfix, keepalive, topology, verb level, custom directives), L2TP (refuse-chap/refuse-pap, lcp-echo, idle timeout, require-mschap-v2), IKEv2 (DPD interval, rekey time, IKE/ESP proposals, left/right ID, fragment size), SSH (max-sessions, idle-timeout, shell access toggle, allowed-keys).
steps: In panel/panel/web/admin/src/views/NodesView.vue: Extend the PROTOCOL_DEFAULTS extra_json for each protocol with the new fields. OpenVPN: add comp_lzo (boolean, default false), push_routes (string array, default []), fragment (number, default 0 meaning disabled), mssfix (number, default 0), keepalive (string, default '10 120'), topology (string, default 'subnet'), verb (number, default 3), custom_directives (string, default ''). L2TP: add refuse_chap (boolean, default false), refuse_pap (boolean, default true), lcp_echo_interval (number, default 30), lcp_echo_failure (number, default 4), idle_timeout (number, default 0), require_mschap_v2 (boolean, default true). IKEv2: add dpd_interval (number, default 30), dpd_timeout (number, default 150), rekey_time (string, default '4h'), ike_proposals (string, default 'aes256-sha256-modp2048'), esp_proposals (string, default 'aes256-sha256'), left_id (string, default ''), right_id (string, default '%any'), fragment_size (number, default 0). SSH: add max_sessions (number, default 10), idle_timeout (number, default 0), shell_access (boolean, default false), allowed_keys (string, default '').

Add the new form fields to the OpenVPN edit section inside the protocol-form. Group them under a 'Protocol Options' subsection. Add: comp-lzo toggle, push-routes textarea (comma-separated or one per line), fragment number input, mssfix number input, keepalive text input, topology select (subnet/net30/p2p), verbosity level number (0-11), custom directives textarea.
Add the new form fields to the L2TP edit section: refuse-chap toggle, refuse-pap toggle, LCP echo interval number, LCP echo failure number, idle timeout number (0=disabled), require MS-CHAPv2 toggle.

Add the new form fields to the IKEv2 edit section: DPD interval number, DPD timeout number, rekey time text input, IKE proposals text input, ESP proposals text input, left ID text input, right ID text input, fragment size number.
Add the new form fields to the SSH edit section: max sessions number, idle timeout number (0=disabled), shell access toggle, allowed keys textarea (one per line).

Move the new protocol-specific fields into a collapsible 'Protocol Options' details/summary section (similar to existing 'Advanced Settings' section) so the form is not overwhelming. Keep basic fields (port, network, transport, cipher, etc.) at top level.
Ensure the startEdit function properly merges defaults with existing config for the new fields so existing configs are not broken (backward compatible).
Add responsive grid styles: on mobile the form grid should be single column.
acceptance_criteria: OpenVPN config form shows comp-lzo, push routes, fragment, mssfix, keepalive, topology, verb level, and custom directives fields
L2TP config form shows refuse-chap, refuse-pap, lcp-echo interval/failure, idle timeout, require mschap-v2 fields
IKEv2 config form shows DPD interval/timeout, rekey time, IKE/ESP proposals, left/right ID, fragment size fields
SSH config form shows max-sessions, idle-timeout, shell access toggle, allowed-keys fields
New fields are under a collapsible 'Protocol Options' section to keep the UI clean
Existing protocol configs are not broken (backward compatible merge in startEdit)
findings: All acceptance criteria met. vue-tsc passes, vite build succeeds, vitest tests pass. Added KTextarea import for multiline fields. Responsive mobile styles added with @media max-width 640px. Backward compatible since startEdit already merges defaults with existing config via spread operator.
